name: launch_workflow
description: Create and launch a new contract workflow from a specified template. You provide the template ID, workflow attributes (contract title, counterparty info, contract value, etc.), and optionally specify approvers. The workflow will begin its configured approval and signature process.

parameters.name: template
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow template to launch from.

parameters.name: attributes
parameters.description: Key-value pairs of workflow attributes as defined in the template (e.g., counterparty name, contract value, effective date).

parameters.name: creator
parameters.description: The user launching the workflow, specified by email.
